calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Bruce M. Lubarsky, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant, Madeleine Wu appears in Pro Per; No appearance by Respondent Maria Podesta by the time matter was called. Parties and witnesses were previously sworn.
9:45am
Ms. Wu states to the Court that the respondent called her the night before to say the matter was continued. Court records do not reflect that Ms. Podesta got a proper continuance.
9:51am
Due to non-appearance of respondent the Court dismisses the matter. No evidence was received or admitted.
